hero.subtitle: Precision Metal Fabrication
hero.tagline: Wrought Iron Art, Defined by Design

about.heading: About Solide
about.body: We transform raw metal into architectural expressions. Every weld, every cut, every finish carries the weight of our commitment to precision.

items.title: Stairs & Railings
items.desc: Indoor and outdoor wrought iron stairs with intricate railings and electrostatic coating for lasting beauty.

items.title: Windows & Doors
items.desc: Wrought iron windows, security grilles, and gates in modern and classic designs.

items.title: Balconies & Fences
items.desc: Iron fencing and perimeter solutions for villas and buildings — strength and elegance combined.

items.title: Gates & Entrances
items.desc: Premium wrought iron gates for villas and compounds — handcrafted designs blending security with aesthetics.

items.title: Electrostatic Coating
items.desc: Rust and weather-resistant protective layer — a consistent standard on every piece.

items.title: Installation & Maintenance
items.desc: Specialized installation team with a full-year warranty and maintenance service.

videos.heading: In Motion
videos.subtitle: See our fabrication process and finished projects.
